Feature · The State of NA CS

The Scene Isn't Dead. It's Just Unwatched.

By the GRIT desk · readgrit.us

North America was once home to legendary rosters, packed arenas, and a region that demanded respect on the international stage. The Boston Major. The Liquid era. Cloud9's finest hour.

Then the organizations left. The coverage dried up. And the players kept grinding anyway — in ESEA Open at midnight, in FACEIT pugs at 2am, in college programs nobody covers — with no one watching closely enough to notice them.

That's the gap GRIT exists to close. Not another news account. Not a highlight reel. A scouting report — built to surface the talent operating below every major outlet's radar, and track them until someone signs them.

Mission statement
"We find the players nobody is watching yet — and we watch them until the world catches on."
